name: BlobTracking
description: Decomposed Blob Track: FFI detection → NN identity tracking → 1€ temporal smoothing → HUD overlay chain. The HUD chain currently composites hollow boxes (blob_overlay_render) and corner brackets (wgsl_compute per-pixel SDF). Future elements (crosshairs, ticks, gauges, dashed connections, hex/coord/distance labels) are wgsl_compute nodes added to the chain — each a small WGSL shader the user can edit in the graph editor.
